eavsr 0.1.0

Cross-cycle variable crosswalk

Source: R/crosswalk.R
eavs_crosswalk.Rd

Returns the package's hand-curated crosswalk that maps EAVS variable codes (e.g. A1a, D2a, F1b) to a stable harmonized name across survey cycles, with a topical section label.

Usage

eavs_crosswalk()

Value

A tibble with one row per (cycle, variable) pair.

Details

This is the intellectual core of eavsr: EAVS variable names drift across cycles, and analyses spanning multiple cycles need a stable rename. The shipped crosswalk is a starting point — open an issue or PR if you spot a misalignment.

Examples

eavs_crosswalk()
#> # A tibble: 17 × 5
#>    cycle variable harmonized                     section        description     
#>    <dbl> <chr>    <chr>                          <chr>          <chr>           
#>  1  2024 A1a      registered_voters_total        registration   Total registere…
#>  2  2024 A1b      registered_voters_active       registration   Active register…
#>  3  2024 A1c      registered_voters_inactive     registration   Inactive regist…
#>  4  2024 B1a      voting_systems_count           technology     Number of votin…
#>  5  2024 C1a      absentee_ballots_transmitted   mail_voting    Absentee/mail b…
#>  6  2024 C1b      absentee_ballots_returned      mail_voting    Absentee/mail b…
#>  7  2024 C1c      absentee_ballots_counted       mail_voting    Absentee/mail b…
#>  8  2024 D1a      polling_places_election_day    polling_places Number of physi…
#>  9  2024 D2a      polling_places_total           polling_places Total polling p…
#> 10  2024 D7a      poll_workers_total             staffing       Total number of…
#> 11  2024 D8       poll_worker_difficulty         staffing       Difficulty obta…
#> 12  2024 E1a      ballots_rejected_provisional   rejections     Provisional bal…
#> 13  2024 F1a      turnout_total_ballots_counted  participation  Total ballots c…
#> 14  2024 F1b      turnout_in_person_election_day participation  Ballots cast in…
#> 15  2024 F1c      turnout_in_person_early        participation  Ballots cast in…
#> 16  2024 F1d      turnout_by_mail                participation  Ballots cast by…
#> 17  2024 F1e      turnout_provisional            participation  Provisional bal…
